name: Electronics
description: Comprehensive collection of electronic devices and gadgets including computers, smartphones, tablets, and accessories. This category encompasses all consumer electronics and tech products designed for personal and professional use.

name: Computers & Laptops
description: Desktop computers, laptops, and portable computing devices. Includes desktops for gaming and work, ultrabooks, 2-in-1 convertibles, and chromebooks suitable for various computing needs and budgets.

name: Mobile Devices
description: Smartphones and mobile phones from leading manufacturers. Features the latest models with advanced processors, high-resolution displays, and cutting-edge camera technology for photography and videography.

name: Home & Garden
description: Products for home improvement, decoration, and garden maintenance. Includes furniture, bedding, kitchen appliances, gardening tools, outdoor equipment, and decorative items to enhance living spaces.

name: Kitchen Appliances
description: Small and large kitchen appliances for food preparation and cooking. Includes microwaves, blenders, coffee makers, ovens, refrigerators, dishwashers, and other essential kitchen equipment.

name: Furniture
description: Indoor and outdoor furniture including sofas, chairs, tables, beds, cabinets, and storage solutions. Offers various styles from modern to traditional to suit different interior design preferences.

name: Clothing & Accessories
description: Fashion apparel and accessories for men, women, and children. Includes clothing, footwear, bags, belts, hats, scarves, and jewelry for casual wear, formal occasions, and athletic activities.

name: Men's Clothing
description: Apparel specifically designed for men including shirts, pants, jackets, suits, and underwear. Features both casual and formal wear from various brands and price points.

name: Women's Clothing
description: Fashion apparel for women including dresses, blouses, pants, skirts, jackets, and activewear. Offers diverse styles, sizes, and colors to match different tastes and occasions.

name: Sports & Outdoors
description: Equipment and gear for sports, fitness, and outdoor activities. Includes exercise equipment, athletic wear, camping gear, hiking equipment, bicycles, and sports balls for various recreational pursuits.

name: Books & Media
description: Physical and digital books, audiobooks, magazines, DVDs, and streaming content. Covers fiction, non-fiction, educational materials, entertainment, and reference materials for all ages and interests.

name: Health & Beauty
description: Personal care products, cosmetics, skincare, haircare, and wellness items. Includes vitamins, supplements, grooming tools, fragrances, and beauty products for daily personal care and maintenance.
